$schema_hint: See lib/mcp/registry.ts :: McpServerConfig for field docs.
_note: Phase 1 seed file. The first pilot entry (Google Calendar) is commented out below — to activate, copy it into the servers array, set GOOGLE_CALENDAR_MCP_URL in Vercel, seed a user_mcp_connections row with the user's bearer token, and rebuild. Leaving the array empty is the safe default: no MCP servers mount, the Super Agent runs with only native Lumo agents.

_pilot_gcal_template.one_liner: Lumo can read your calendar to plan around existing commitments.

scopes.name: calendar.readonly
scopes.description: Read your calendar to suggest conflict-free times.
